text: Do you have no control over your shopping habits?
If so, you may have a shopping addiction.
If this habit is taking over your life, you've come to the right place.
We have a few pieces of advice to help you overcome your addiction.
To start, you'll need to take note of what triggers you to shop.
Is it low self-esteem, depression, boredom, etc.?
Whatever it is, document what happens and how you feel before you get the urge to shop.
Once you know what prompts your shopping habit,
you can then work to replace shopping with a healthier alternative.
Perhaps you could start a new hobby, undertake a DIY home project, exercise - You get the idea.
We also advise forcing yourself to wait a while before buying anything.
So, if the urge to shop crops up, don't buy anything.
This is the only way to tackle compulsive spending.
Instead, keep busy with something else and then evaluate how you feel.
In a couple of days, you might not even want it anymore!
Want to learn more? Check out more actionable steps below.
